form.formComment: Last start raced on the pace before fading 12th of 16 at Vaal on March 31 over 1200m, 7 len behind Romilly with 60.1kg at $11. Before that won by 2.5 len at Vaal February 10 over 1000m defeating Star Blaze with 60kg at $4.50. Much better than last run and rates highly on the win the start prior. Back in trip and worth another chance.

form.formComment: At the latest run ran last in a small field at Vaal on March 28 over 1000m, 6 len behind Fiery Rose with 52.5kg at $17. form.formComment: Comes here off a 29-day let-up. Last start 2nd of 15 at this track on March 14 over 1160m, 4 len behind Captain Selvie carrying 55.5kg at $41. The start before that ran last of 7 at Turffontein Inside on February 19 over 1200m, 6 len behind Bright And Brazen carrying 56kg at $9. Others going much better heading into this one.
